title: Leetcode Pattern Recognition Guide
description: Identify recurring patterns in Leetcode problems — sliding window, two pointers, BFS/DFS, dynamic programming, and more. Helps you solve new problems faster by recognizing which pattern to apply.

title: Prefix Trees and Tries
description: Deep dive into trie data structures — implementation, operations (insert, search, delete), and real-world applications like autocomplete, spell checking, and IP routing.

title: Crafting Interpreters
description: Build two complete interpreters from scratch — a tree-walk interpreter in Java and a bytecode VM in C. Covers scanning, parsing, name resolution, closures, garbage collection, and more. By Robert Nystrom.

title: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs
description: The legendary MIT textbook (SICP). Teaches computational thinking through Scheme — abstraction, recursion, higher-order functions, interpreters, and metalinguistic abstraction. By Abelson & Sussman.

title: Guide_To_Clear_Java_Developer_Interview_-_Contains_250_Java_Spring-Boot_Microservice_Interview_Questions
description: 250 interview questions covering Java core, Spring Boot, microservices, REST APIs, and system design. Includes detailed answers and explanations for mid-to-senior level interviews.

title: Head First Java 2nd Edition
description: Beginner-friendly Java guide using visual learning — puzzles, games, and humor. Covers OOP, threading, networking, GUI with Swing, and collections. Great first Java book.

title: Introduction to Programming Using Java
description: Free CS1-level textbook covering Java fundamentals — variables, control flow, arrays, OOP, recursion, linked lists, and GUI programming. Suitable for university courses.

title: Java How to Program, 9th edition
description: Comprehensive Java textbook by Deitel & Deitel. Covers everything from basics to advanced topics — OOP, generics, collections, JDBC, multithreading, networking, and web services.

title: OCP Oracle Certified Professional Java SE 21 Developer Study Guide
file_path: 1_Computer_Science_Fundamentals/Programming_Languages/Java/OCP Oracle Certified Professional Java SE 21 Developer Study Guide.pdf
description: Official study guide for Java SE 21 certification (1Z0-830). Covers records, sealed classes, pattern matching, virtual threads, and all exam objectives with practice questions.

title: Spring Start Here
description: Gentle introduction to the Spring ecosystem — IoC, DI, Spring Boot, REST APIs, data persistence, and security. Focuses on practical skills for building production-ready applications. By Laurențiu Spilcă.

title: Teach Yourself Java in 21 days
description: Day-by-day structured Java learning path — from Hello World to applets, networking, and multithreading. Each chapter is designed as one day of study with exercises.

title: TroubleShooting Java, 2th edition
description: Practical guide for debugging and profiling Java apps — thread dumps, heap analysis, memory leaks, slow queries, and production issues. Essential for senior developers.

title: Eloquent JavaScript
description: Modern JavaScript from the ground up — values, functions, closures, OOP, async/await, DOM manipulation, Node.js, and practical projects. Free online book by Marijn Haverbeke.

title: 20 Years of Linux Experience in 20Minutes
description: Quick-reference cheat sheet distilling 20 years of Linux sysadmin knowledge — essential commands, file system, permissions, networking, processes, and shell scripting tips.

title: A Latency Handbook for SWE - Quang Hoang
file_path: 1_Computer_Science_Fundamentals/Systems_and_OS/A Latency Handbook for SWE - Quang Hoang.pdf
description: Practical latency numbers every engineer should know — L1/L2 cache, RAM, SSD, network hops, and database queries. Helps you make informed performance trade-offs in system design.

title: Computer Systems A Programmer's Perspective 3rd Edition
description: The definitive CS:APP textbook — data representation, assembly, memory hierarchy, caching, linking, virtual memory, concurrency, and networking. By Bryant & O'Hallaron (CMU).

title: Operating Systems - Three Easy Pieces
description: OSTEP — the three pieces of OS: virtualization (CPU, memory), concurrency (threads, locks), and persistence (file systems, I/O). Free, clear, and widely used in universities.

title: Database Internals
description: How databases work under the hood — B-Trees, LSM-Trees, storage engines, transaction processing, replication, consensus algorithms (Paxos, Raft), and distributed storage. By Alex Petrov.

title: SQL Performance Explained
description: Master SQL indexing and query optimization — how indexes work, EXPLAIN plans, join strategies, pagination, and avoiding common performance pitfalls. By Markus Winand.

title: DevOps Roadmap Ebook 2025
description: 2025 DevOps learning roadmap — Linux, Git, CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana), cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure), and career progression paths.

title: Game Programming Patterns
description: Design patterns applied to game development — game loop, update method, component, observer, command, flyweight, state, and spatial partitioning. By Robert Nystrom.

title: A Philosophy of Software Design
description: Fight complexity with deep modules, information hiding, and strategic programming. Argues against shallow abstractions and over-engineering. Concise and opinionated. By John Ousterhout (Stanford).

title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
description: The DDIA bible — data models, storage engines, replication, partitioning, transactions, consistency, batch/stream processing, and the future of data systems. By Martin Kleppmann.

title: Kiến trúc ứng dụng web
description: Tài liệu tiếng Việt về kiến trúc ứng dụng web — mô hình MVC, microservices, API gateway, load balancing, caching, và các mẫu thiết kế phổ biến cho ứng dụng web.

title: Kiến trúc ứng dụng web
description: Tài liệu tiếng Việt về kiến trúc ứng dụng web — mô hình MVC, microservices, API gateway, load balancing, caching, và các mẫu thiết kế phổ biến cho ứng dụng web. (Bản PDF)

title: System Design
description: Core system design concepts — scalability, load balancers, CDN, databases (SQL vs NoSQL), caching, message queues, and step-by-step design of real systems like URL shortener, chat app, news feed.

title: The Ultimate System Design Playbook
description: Interview-focused system design guide — framework for approaching any design question, common patterns (sharding, replication, event-driven), and 10+ detailed case studies.

title: go-with-domain
description: Domain-Driven Design in Go — clean architecture, CQRS, event sourcing, and practical DDD patterns implemented with real Go code. By Three Dots Labs.

title: Cracking the Coding Interview
description: The #1 coding interview book — 189 programming questions with solutions, Big-O analysis, data structures, algorithms, system design, behavioral tips, and company-specific insights. By Gayle McDowell.

title: 10 Essential Coding Projects to Master Your Fundamentals and Land a $100,000+ Job ASAP
file_path: 3_Career_and_Professional_Development/Job_Search_and_Career_Growth/10 Essential Coding Projects to Master Your Fundamentals and Land a $100,000+ Job ASAP.pdf
description: 10 portfolio-worthy projects to build your skills — full-stack apps, CLI tools, APIs, and more. Each project targets specific fundamentals that employers look for.

title: Learn How to Code Online and Land a 100k Job ASAP
file_path: 3_Career_and_Professional_Development/Job_Search_and_Career_Growth/Learn How to Code Online and Land a 100k Job ASAP.pdf
description: Roadmap for self-taught developers — best free/paid resources, learning strategies, building a portfolio, networking, resume tips, and job search tactics for landing your first dev role.

title: AK Method Step By Step My English Learning Journey From Beginner To Advanced
file_path: 4_Miscellaneous/English_Learning/AK Method Step By Step My English Learning Journey From Beginner To Advanced.pdf
description: Personal journey from zero to advanced English using the AK Method — listening-first approach, shadowing techniques, input-based learning, and daily practice routines.

title: THE 4-STEP ENGLISH MASTERY SYSTEM
description: A 4-step framework for English fluency — immersion, active listening, speaking practice, and feedback loops. Practical tips for non-native speakers to reach conversational confidence.

title: The_Truth_About_Learning_English_v2
description: Debunks common myths about English learning — why grammar-first approaches fail, the science of language acquisition, and evidence-based methods that actually work.

title: Quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu
description: Giáo trình quản trị CSDL — cài đặt, cấu hình, backup/restore, quản lý user/permission, tối ưu hiệu năng, và bảo mật cơ sở dữ liệu. Dành cho sinh viên CNTT.

title: Thương mại điện tử
description: Giáo trình thương mại điện tử — mô hình kinh doanh online (B2B, B2C, C2C), hệ thống thanh toán, marketing số, bảo mật giao dịch, và pháp luật TMĐT tại Việt Nam.

title: Ch01_Gioi thieu ve PTTKHT
description: Chương 1: Giới thiệu về Phân Tích Thiết Kế Hệ Thống — khái niệm hệ thống thông tin, vai trò của phân tích viên, vòng đời phát triển phần mềm (SDLC).

title: Ch02_Lap ke hoach va quan tri du an
file_path: 5_University_Courses/PTTKHT_Systems_Analysis_and_Design/Ch02_Lap ke hoach va quan tri du an.pdf
description: Chương 2: Lập kế hoạch và quản trị dự án — ước lượng chi phí, lập lịch, biểu đồ Gantt, quản lý rủi ro, và các phương pháp quản lý dự án phần mềm.

title: Ch03_Mô hình phat trien phan mem
description: Chương 3: Mô hình phát triển phần mềm — Waterfall, Spiral, Agile, Scrum, V-Model. So sánh ưu nhược điểm và khi nào nên dùng mô hình nào.

title: Ch04_Thu thap thong tin
description: Chương 4: Thu thập thông tin — kỹ thuật phỏng vấn, bảng câu hỏi, quan sát, nghiên cứu tài liệu, và phân tích yêu cầu hệ thống.

title: Ch05a_Mo hinh hoa quy trinh va du lieu
file_path: 5_University_Courses/PTTKHT_Systems_Analysis_and_Design/Ch05a_Mo hinh hoa quy trinh va du lieu.pdf
description: Chương 5a: Mô hình hóa quy trình và dữ liệu — biểu đồ luồng dữ liệu (DFD), mô hình ER, phân rã chức năng, và quy trình nghiệp vụ.

title: Ch05b_Tu dien du lieu
description: Chương 5b: Từ điển dữ liệu — định nghĩa các thực thể, thuộc tính, luồng dữ liệu, kho dữ liệu, và quy tắc ràng buộc trong hệ thống.

title: Ch06_Chuyen tiep sang giai doan thiet ke
file_path: 5_University_Courses/PTTKHT_Systems_Analysis_and_Design/Ch06_Chuyen tiep sang giai doan thiet ke.pdf
description: Chương 6: Chuyển tiếp sang giai đoạn thiết kế — từ phân tích sang thiết kế, đặc tả yêu cầu, và chuẩn bị tài liệu thiết kế hệ thống.

title: Ch07_Thiet ke co so du lieu
description: Chương 7: Thiết kế cơ sở dữ liệu — chuyển đổi mô hình ER sang lược đồ quan hệ, chuẩn hóa (1NF, 2NF, 3NF, BCNF), và tối ưu hóa schema.

title: Ch08_Thiet ke giao dien nguoi dung
description: Chương 8: Thiết kế giao diện người dùng — nguyên tắc UI/UX, thiết kế form, menu, báo cáo, và tương tác người-máy. Prototype và đánh giá giao diện.

title: Ch09_Thiet ke kien truc ung dung
description: Chương 9: Thiết kế kiến trúc ứng dụng — kiến trúc client-server, 3-tier, n-tier, phân chia module, và thiết kế các thành phần xử lý.

title: Ch10_Phat trien ung dung_cai dat_van hanh
description: Chương 10: Phát triển, cài đặt, và vận hành — coding standards, testing (unit, integration, system), deployment strategies, training, và bảo trì hệ thống.

title: Ch11_Mo hinh hoa huong doi tuong
description: Chương 11: Mô hình hóa hướng đối tượng — biểu đồ UML (use case, class, sequence, activity, state), phân tích và thiết kế hướng đối tượng (OOAD).
